testcase.name: test_stream_lifecycle_and_callbacks_no_raise
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:28 统一基础设施集成层不可用，使用降级方案: cannot import name 'get_data_adapter' from 'src.core.integration' (unknown location) WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:459 统一基础设施集成层不可用，使用标准logging WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:495 使用降级基础设施服务 WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:516 降级缓存初始化失败: No module named 'src.data.core.cache' INFO data_registry:registry.py:36 DataRegistry initialized INFO disk_cache:disk_cache.py:76 DiskCache initialized with cache_dir: cache INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:245 使用降级缓存管理器 WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:847 StockDataLoader not available WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:853 IndexDataLoader not available WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:860 NewsDataLoader not available WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:867 FinancialDataLoader not available INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:578 核心服务注册完成 INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:269 DataManager initialized successfully INFO disk_cache:disk_cache.py:76 DiskCache initialized with cache_dir: enhanced_cache INFO enhanced_integration_manager:enhanced_integration_manager.py:500 增强版数据集成管理器初始化完成 INFO enhanced_integration_manager:enhanced_integration_manager.py:555 创建数据流: test_stream_1763304937 INFO enhanced_integration_manager:enhanced_integration_manager.py:95 启动实时数据流: test_stream_1763304937 INFO enhanced_integration_manager:enhanced_integration_manager.py:107 停止实时数据流: test_stream_1763304937 INFO enhanced_integration_manager:enhanced_integration_manager.py:681 关闭增强版数据集成管理器 INFO enhanced_integration_manager:enhanced_integration_manager.py:107 停止实时数据流: test_stream_1763304937 INFO disk_cache:disk_cache.py:76 Cleaned up 30 expired cache files INFO disk_cache:disk_cache.py:76 DiskCache closed INFO data_cache_manager:cache_manager.py:306 正在停止缓存管理器...
